text:
Julius Yego during a training session in Miramas, France ahead of the Paris 2024 Olympics.[NOC'K Media]

title: Paris Olympics 2024: Julius Yego aims to retire in style at the Olympics
author: Ochieng Oyugi
description: A gold medal will be a perfect retirement package for the Kenyan athlete.
